notes: langgraph-cli==0.4.31 (2026-07-10T22:58:04Z) CLI release ~21h after 1.2.9. Allow langgraph-api versions up to 1.0.0 + bundled dependency updates including Starlette + LangSmith. Load-bearing bit: langgraph-api-major-version compatibility widening on CLI-and-API-version-fidelity axis; hints at forthcoming langgraph-api 1.0.0 major version. Severity 🟡 (Cat 2 default ⚠ possible; borderline ⚠/🟡 → down per doctrine because CLI patch is non-kit-load-bearing on its own; langgraph-api-1.0.0-compatibility signal is worth watching for forthcoming major version). Three-fix DeltaChannel arc (06-30 1.2.7 + 07-06 1.2.8 + 07-09/10 1.2.9) remains Monthly Integration slot candidate for KB-06 §hosted-agent-observability.
